slides.title: Executive summary
slides.body: Sarah Chen presents as a hiring profile centered on Senior ML Engineer · Transformer architectures, Instruction tuning from San Francisco, CA. Grounded evidence suggests about 5.0 year(s) of experience across 6 structured role(s). Top strengths: Strong record in transformer-based workloads, large-scale inference, and technical leadership; Technical leadership for small ML teams, mentorship, and cross-functional delivery. Primary watchout: Missing specific details on recent projects or contributions at Aurora AI Systems.
